details.test: Task 1: Favorite up to three high-rated cat comics
Task 2: Create 'Monday Mood Boost' playlist and add comics
Task 3: Comment on top-rated office comic (banana comment)
Task 4: Add two qualifying books to cart and set quantity to 1
Task 5: Subscribe to featured series and add first episodes to 'Weekend binge'
Task 6: Random Laugh -> bookmark food comic and add to 'Late Night Snacks' playlist
Task 7: Update settings to dark theme & content filters
Task 8: Create 'Tonight's Binge' reading queue from today trending
Task 9: Add cheaper qualifying digital gag strip collection to library
